summary: Iteration 4 — UI tweaks on Home screen verified end-to-end. All 5 requested tweaks are live and correct. Backend regression: 16/16 pytest tests pass. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): (1) Header eyebrow displays 'MEAL MATE' in uppercase red; no 'Ghar ka khana' anywhere in DOM. (2) No 3 small ambience icons in the top-right of the header — header area contains only eyebrow + title + subtitle. (3) 'Tap to open the fridge' chip/pill is visible above the fridge when closed (with chevron-down prefix) and disappears as soon as the door opens. (4) Four items sit ON TOP of the fridge body: black pan with brown handle, dark-red wine bottle, green wine bottle, and green planter with terracotta pot — all rendered on the topShelf row above the fridge. (5) Closed fridge door shows: red circular magnet (top-left), green circular magnet (top-right), orange tilted-square magnet, red heart-shape magnet, red sticky note 'what's inside your fridge?', orange calendar '11', left-side brown handle. Full E2E flow still works: open fridge → Potato chip → Suggest recipes → /suggestions loads 3 cards → tap first → /recipe shows 'Aloo Jeera' with YouTube iframe src=https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IOfVcE1SkGg?rel=0&modestbranding=1 playing correctly.

react_native_issues.issue: In screenshot the chevron-down occasionally renders as '?' glyph on web — likely a font-loading race on first paint. Not a blocker; the text 'Tap to open the fridge' is fully readable.

Cosmetic console warnings persist from prior iterations: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' and '"hand" is not a valid icon name for family "feather"'. Web-only deprecation/icon warnings; no functional impact.

action_items: Optional: replace Feather 'hand' icon (used somewhere — possibly CookingLoader) with a valid Feather name (e.g., 'pointer', 'thumbs-up') to silence the 'hand is not a valid icon name for family feather' console warning.
Optional: migrate pointerEvents prop to style.pointerEvents on the animated door view to silence RN-Web deprecation.
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx: header cleanly reduced to eyebrow + title + subtitle — old decorative top-right icons removed as requested.

topShelf layout uses flex-direction:row with space-around so pan/bottles/planter sit evenly on top of the fridge body; zIndex:2 correctly places them above the fridge for visual 'sitting on top' effect.
tapHint conditionally rendered with !open check — correctly hides after the fridge opens. Styled as pill with chevron-down + text, positioned absolutely above the fridge.
Door magnets (magnetA/B/C + heart) use pure Views with backgroundColor — no external assets needed, keeps bundle lean. Heart composed of two circles + rotated square is a clean trick.
Fridge open/close interaction preserved: toggleFridge only fires on closed state (onPress={() => !open && toggleFridge()}); 'Tap to close the fridge' hint remains below the fridge when open.

End-to-end flow (suggest → recipe → YouTube iframe) unaffected by UI tweaks — all existing testIDs (fridge, ingredient-input, generate-btn, suggestion-N, recipe-title, youtube-video) continue to work.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 UI tweaks + full E2E flow verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 UI tweaks all verified live on https://instant-recipe.preview.emergentagent.com. Home screen is now 'Meal Mate' branded with the new fridge scene (pan + 2 wine bottles + planter on top shelf, plus 4 magnets on the door, sticky note, calendar, handle, and a visible 'Tap to open the fridge' hint). No backend changes. Only cosmetic residual issues are RN-Web console warnings (invalid 'hand' Feather icon name + pointerEvents prop deprecation) that have no user-facing effect.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bug in this iteration; pure UI enhancement verification.
